message:
chore(ntm): session log state sync

Tracked .ntm/logs/*.log files saw activity this session:
- am-coding_agent_session_search.log: +54 lines (Agent Mail events)
- cm-coding_agent_session_search.log: +8 lines (CASS memory events)

Same pre-gitignore-tracking quirk as the sibling beads_rust commit —
logs are ignored by .gitignore line pattern but the files entered the
index before the pattern was added, so they continue to surface on
every NTM session turn. Landing the update to clear the working tree.
